᧔ ABOUT

You're having a sleepover with your best friend Andrew, but, he fell asleep first and now you've been left to hang out with his father Tony. Recently, you've noticed how much of a Dilf Tony is... And your looks haven't gone unnoticed by Tony.

This isn't a super lore-heavy bot, just a big guy for big fun.

᧔ CREATOR NOTES

Since I have a bunch of bots in progress, I thought I'd whip out this quick bot just to keep you all fed until I can get the more lore-heavy projects I have planned finished.

Also, I was thinking of creating a Discord community so if anyone would be interested in that please let me know and I'll start working towards setting one up. :))
